'''shajuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjutant|coadjutant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjutant|coadjutant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shajuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæjijith|shæjijith]] || [[word:shæjijij|shæjijij]] || [[word:shæjijish|shæjijish]] || [[word:shæjiji|shæjiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajujujuth|shajujujuth]] || [[word:shajujujuj|shajujujuj]] || [[word:shajujujush|shajujujush]] || [[word:shajujuju|shajujuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajujuth|shajujuth]] || [[word:shajujuj|shajujuj]] || [[word:shajujush|shajujush]] || [[word:shajuju|shajuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajufjuth|shajufjuth]] || [[word:shajufjuj|shajufjuj]] || [[word:shajufjush|shajufjush]] || [[word:shajufjuf|shajufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shajujuthu|shajujuthu]] || [[word:shajujuju|shajujuju]] || [[word:shajujushu|shajujushu]] || [[word:shajujuku|shajujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shajujuth|shajujuth]] || [[word:shajujuj|shajujuj]] || [[word:shajujush|shajujush]] || [[word:shajuju|shajuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shajujuthul|shajujuthul]] || [[word:shajujujul|shajujujul]] || [[word:shajujushul|shajujushul]] || [[word:shajujukul|shajujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shajujuthuthu|shajujuthuthu]] || [[word:shajujujuju|shajujujuju]] || [[word:shajujushushu|shajujushushu]] || [[word:shajujuku|shajujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shajujuthun|shajujuthun]] || [[word:shajujujun|shajujujun]] || [[word:shajujushun|shajujushun]] || [[word:shajujukun|shajujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shajujuthuoro|shajujuthuoro]] || [[word:shajujujuoro|shajujujuoro]] || [[word:shajujushuoro|shajujushuoro]] || [[word:shajujukuoro|shajujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
